name: Frozen Bread Dough for Pizza Dough
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Frozen Bread Dough,  see note
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread dough evenly over the bottom of a 12-inch (inches) pizza pan that has been coated with cooking spray.
2. Push the dough up to the edge of the pan, forming a rim. If the dough is too sticky, dust it lightly with flour.
3. Using a fork, prick the dough 15 times.
4. Brush the dough with olive oil.
5. Follow the directions in your pizza sauce recipe.
